description:
Parent epic: V3 E4: Actions and tools

Source task 1/7 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Standardize V3 naming around `action`; use `tool` only where model/provider
  terminology requires it.

Epic closure criteria:
- the public DSL reads as actions/capabilities, not plumbing
- all operation surfaces have consistent validation and inspection
- tests cover duplicate/invalid operation registration

comments.text: Standardized the public authoring surface around actions by adding Jidoka.Action, switching fixtures and docs to action language, hiding Jidoka.Tool as the provider bridge, and updating validation messages for direct action modules and operation-name conflicts.

title: E4: Standardize V3 naming around action; use tool only where model/provider termino...
